## Compatibility

- [ ] This is backward-compatible within the current draft.
- [ ] This may break current draft examples, schemas, adapters, or package helpers.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=moderate`
- [ ] `git diff --check`

## Safety And Data

- [ ] No real customer, pet, owner, staff, facility, billing, medical, secret, or credential data is included.
- [ ] Normative examples remain vendor-neutral.
- [ ] Security-sensitive concerns were handled through `SECURITY.md` instead of public review.
